svg.title: OriGENE end-to-end pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Five-stage flowchart from raw SRA data to cancer gene classification, with two Snakemake workflow lanes and a mutation branch.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SRA data acquisition step in OriGENE')
g.text: Download SRA → fastq-dump → bowtie2 (hg38) → samtools → bedSort

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are chromosome files created in OriGENE?')
g.text: awk splits bedGraph.sorted by chromosome → per-chr .txt files

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does OriGENE extract per-gene epigenetic tracks?')
g.text: create_txt() · TSS ± 2000 bp window · cancer + normal tracks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What preprocessing does OriGENE apply before model training?')
g.text: Zero-pad / crop → gap-fill → reshape (n, bp, tracks)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the OriGENE mutation feature pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does the mutation branch model differ from the main OriGENE model?')
sendPrompt('Describe the OriGENE CNN architecture in detail')
g.text: Avg Pool → Conv1D + ReLU → Inception blocks

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are the output labels from OriGENE?')
g.text: P(cancer driver) per gene · Labels: OG · TSG · NG · validated vs Cancer Gene Census
